title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026: Apply for Project Technical Support - I Post
short_info: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER), Puducherry has released an official advertisement for Project Technical Support - I positions.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be notified 1 week in advance

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Up to 28 years old on the final date of application receipt. | Field Requirement: Candidates must be willing to travel to urban and rural health facilities across Puducherry districts for data collection.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and parameters specified by the Principal Investigator: | Core Education: Class 10 pass along with a Diploma in Emergency Medical Technician (EMT) or Medical Laboratory Technician (MLT). Work Experience: Minimum of 2 years of experience in the relevant field or subject. Languages: Good command over reading, writing, and speaking Tamil and English.

salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete an offline registration process via email:
Download the prescribed application format attached to official advertisement Advt. No. JIP/EM&T/F-MA/ICMR-INDIA EMS Project/2026/N03C.
Fill out the application form completely and attach a copy of your updated CV alongside relevant educational or experience certificates.
Scan all papers into a single, combined PDF file.
